title: Viewer reads the per-file issues directory
description: Point the status-page viewer at the per-file layout: glob `.excn/issues/**/*.json` instead of reading `backlog.json`. Handle an empty issues directory and a missing `backlog.json` (fresh-Instance path) without erroring, and sort sanely when legacy ids (no uuid timestamp prefix) and UUIDv7 ids coexist.
acceptance_criteria: The viewer renders issues by globbing `.excn/issues/**/*.json`, not by reading `backlog.json`
An empty `.excn/issues/` and a missing `backlog.json` render cleanly (fresh-Instance path) — G7
Mixed legacy-id and UUIDv7 records sort in a sane, stable order; the uuid-prefix=creation-order claim degrades gracefully for legacy ids
